metadata.direction: Kanji character → list of sentence IDs whose Japanese text contains that kanji. IDs use the 'tatoeba-{n}' format.

field_notes.mapping: Enables 'show me example sentences with 食' queries. Scope is the Tatoeba curated corpus. Sentence IDs use '{source}-{n}' convention.

metadata.source: Derived cross-reference built from data/corpus/sentences.json by build/transform/cross_links.py.
